field.name: maintenanceVirtualStockLocation
field.domain: self.usableOnProduction = True AND self.typeSelect = 3 AND self.company = :company
field.help: This configuration allows you to define the default virtual maintenance location for the company. This location will be used for maintenance of production machines.

field.name: maintenanceComponentsStockLocation
field.domain: self.usableOnProduction = True AND self.company = :company and self.typeSelect != 3
field.help: This configuration allows you to define the default stock location for the company's components used for maintenance of production machines.
